transcription.text: Hear that? That's a mountain laughing at you. So come prepared in a Kia Sportage. With available all-wheel drive, 237 horsepower, and 260 pound-feet of torque. And not in the less torque and horsepower-equipped Honda CR-V Touring. So you can turn that mountain's laugh into a whimper. Get 0% APR for 75 months on the 2021 Sportage, or lease an LX for $159 a month.
